text: 🚨 ALERT: Getting PagerDuty for DB_POOL_EXHAUSTED on prod. Anyone else seeing this?
Yeah I'm getting paged too. Looking now
order-service is throwing 503s, users can't checkout. Seeing it in Datadog
Declaring P1. @channel — production DB is down. War room in #incident-4821
SSHed into db-primary. Connection pool is full — 200/200. All idle_in_transaction
Wait — we deployed order-service v2.4.1 at 01:45. Could that be it?
Checking pg_stat_activity... yes. 197 connections stuck in idle_in_transaction. This is a connection leak
Added retry logic to order creation. I think I forgot to close the transaction in the exception handler 😬
Killing idle_in_transaction connections now to restore service
Done. Pool is back to 14/200. API gateway circuit breaker should close soon
Datadog showing 503s dropping. Looks like we're recovering 🤞
Orders are going through again. Confirming on my end
Going to rolling restart order-service with a proper connection pool config — max 20 conns, idle timeout 30s
Restart complete. order-service v2.4.1 with hotfix running. All healthy
Resolving P1. Total downtime: ~11 minutes. Post-mortem due by EOD. Arjun owns the fix PR
On it. PR will have the transaction fix + added connection pool monitoring alert so we catch this earlier next time
Thanks team. Fast response. Let's make sure post-mortem captures the deploy → leak → outage chain clearly
